name: Tenshi no Akuma
description: __Height:__ 155 cm Angel Devil is a devil who embodies the fear of angels, and a Public Safety Devil Hunter from Special Division 4. The Angel Devil is a unique case among devils having virtually no hostility towards humans. He dislikes being ordered around and doesn't seem inclined towards combat. His extreme laziness holds him back from being a strong fighter and he often refuses to work, even claiming to prefer dying to working.

name: Himmel
description: Hero and Leader of the party that defeated the Demon King, and a self-proclaimed handsome narcissist. He cares about his friends and can't help but help those in need. He had a great influence on [Frieren](https://anilist.co/character/176754/Frieren), with whom he had adventures for 10 years.

name: Keisuke Baji
description: __Height:__ 175 cm Captain of the 1st division and one of the founders of the Tokyo Manji Gang. Baji has a wild personality. He loves the thrill of adrenaline and [Mikey](https://anilist.co/character/145341) himself says that he would punch someone out on the street for no apparent reason, only because he feels like it. In combat, he is never without his trademark grin.

name: Shinya Kougami
description: Shinya Kougami is an enforcement officer who is tasked with managing crime. Shinya has a high criminal mentality, but because of his skills as a detective, he was released under the condition that he becomes an Enforcer for the Public Safety Bureau, Unit 1. Despite his natural grudge towards Makishima, they are actually somewhat alike, as shown in Shinya's ability to foresee Makishima's actions.

name: Tamaki Amajiki
description: __Height:__ 177cm (5'10") __Quirk:__ Manifest Third-year student in Class 3-A at U.A. High School and part of The Big 3 (the strongest three hero students in all of Japan). Tamaki is extremely shy, aloof, depressed, "intimidating", and introverted, especially around big audiences. He gets nervous very easily when talking to other people. name: Rui Tachibana
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") __Occupations:__ High school student, Apprentice Chef Rui is the younger sister of [Hina Tachibana](https://anilist.co/character/127595/Hina-Tachibana), but soon after [Tsukiko Tachibana](https://anilist.co/character/135347/Tsukiko-Tachibana) (Rui's divorced mother) marries a widower named [Akihito Fujii](https://anilist.co/character/135352/Akihito-Fujii), Rui becomes [Natsuo Fujii](https://anilist.co/character/127594/Natsuo-Fujii)'s step-sister. name: Ulquiorra Cifer
description: __Height:__ 169 cm (5'7") Ulquiorra is a male arrancar with a melancholic appearance. Ulquiora is the 4th ranked espada. Ulquiorra is also analytical; during his and Yammy's first visit to the human world, he makes several remarks on the humans who confront them. He theorizes that Orihime Inoue's healing power is a temporal-spatial ability, which Aizen describes as the rejection of fate, and comments on how Ichigo Kurosaki's final release can easily get through Yammy's defenses. High School and is part of The Big 3 _(the strongest three hero students in all of Japan)_. Before Izuku Midoriya, Mirio was the top candidate for All Might's successor and inheritor of One For All. name: Yuuichi Katagiri
description: Yuuichi Katagiri is a hardworking lad who believes friends are more important than money. In reality, he is a really dead broke student and has multiple part-time jobs to barely live for. He is secretly "the mind" of the team that has managed himself in making all the odds come right to his favor with all might. He also had a rather very heavy past that makes him considered a "devil" and "dangerous." ~! In Chapter 99, it is revealed that Katagiri Yuuichi is the one who created the prototype for

name: Ougi Oshino
description: Ougi appears to be a girl with short black hair, black pupils, and pale white skin. She is a junior of [Koyomi Araragi](https://anilist.co/character/22036/Koyomi-Araragi) at Naoetsu Private High School. Ougi often talks to Koyomi about oddities, and helping him remember what he knows. Her catchphrase is, "I don't know anything, Araragi-senpai. It's you who knows." Ougi is mysterious and can come off as spooky/creepy. She also speaks in a condescending tone towards Koyomi and [Hanekawa](https://a

name: Daiki Aomine
description: __Height:__ 192 cm (6'3'') __Number:__ #6 (Teikou), #5 (Touou) __Position:__ Power Forward __Talent:__ Skill and Agility, Unusual Speed, Zone Play Aomine was the ace of Teikou's team, embracing an aggressive and liquid style, made even more powerful by Kuroko's misdirection. In fact, Aomine was once Kuroko's "Light", before Kagami. Incredibly fast and versatile, Aomine's strength lies in his unpredictability, as well as an uncanny ability to shoot from virtually any position. In his second year

name: Jinshi
description: Jinshi is the eunuch in charge of the affairs of the inner palace. He is described as having a face capable even of outshining the consorts in beauty, amazing women and men alike. He is constantly accompanied by his attendant Gaoshun and has taken an interest to Maomao's intelligence and active demeanor.

name: Azusa Nakano
description: __Height:__ 150 cm Azusa Nakano, nicknamed "Azu-nyan" by [Yui Hirasawa](https://anilist.co/character/19565/Yui-Hirasawa), is a main character in the K-ON! series. She is a second year student at Sakuragaoka High School. She decided to join the Light Music Club after seeing the band's performance in the school festival, and thus became Ho-kago Tea Time's second guitarist. Azusa plays a Fender Japan '69 Reissue Mustang in Candy Apple Red.

name: Bojji
description: The firstborn prince of the Bosse Kingdom. Bojji was born abnormally small, weak, and deaf. He is a powerless prince who has lived his life under the shadow of his father, the legendary [King Bosse](https://anilist.co/character/244198/). He wants to be the world's greatest king, following his father Bojji is extremely hard-working and sincere, and these traits draw people towards him even if they can't always understand him. ~!He learns how to wield a sword thanks to [Despa](https://anilist.co/c

name: Riza Hawkeye
description: Riza Hawkeye is Roy Mustang's most trusted subordinate. She carries out many of the tasks he is too lazy to do, acts as his personal assistant, and protects him from danger. She also doubles as his voice of reason, keeping cool in heated situations and scolding him when he allows his emotions to get in the way. Riza and Roy seem to share a close relationship in both adaptations of Fullmetal Alchemist; in the anime she identifies him as her most precious person, whereas in the manga she loses her

name: Sinbad
description: __Height:__ 183cm __Weakness:__ loves to drink He is the king of Sindria and the leader of the Alliance of the Seven Seas. He was 14 years old when he first captured a dungeon, the first dungeon "Bael". Since then, he had sailed the seven seas and captured seven dungeons. He is known as the "Legendary Dungeon Capturer" being the master of seven djinn. He is also commonly known as "High King of Seven Seas". His nickname is Sin. His name is based on "Sinbad the Sailor". name: Decim
description: Decim is the bartender of Quindecim and also the arbiter of floor 15. His faction deals with people who have died at the same time. He can create threads and use them to restrict rude customers from moving, or use them to hang things. They are strong enough to stop a person in their tracks and swing them hard against the wall.

name: Kanade Tachibana
description: __Height__: 150 cm Kanade Tachibana is the Afterlife School's student council president. She is often referred to as "Tenshi" by the SSS, based on both Yuri's belief that she must be a representative of god and the SSS members not knowing her name initially. Though, they continue to call her "Tenshi" after discovering her real name. Her position often puts her at odds with Yuri and the other SSS members as her responsibilities require her to suppress delinquency and disruptive activities. Her gi

name: Nene Yashiro
description: Yashiro Nene is a normal student, and one day she listens to a rumor about ''Hanako-san'' who makes wishes for anyone, but the wishes come with a price. She visits him in the hope of getting her crush to fall in love with her. She becomes friends with Hanako-san soon after meeting him then. She is in the gardening club.

name: Naoka Ueno
description: A girl from [Ishida](https://anilist.co/character/80491/Ishida-Shouya) and [Nishimiya](https://anilist.co/character/80243/Nishimiya-Shouko)'s elementary school and the girl that Ishida was closest to at school. Ishida remembers her bossing him about and also being his main helper in bullying Nishimiya. After having separated from him since middle school graduation, Ueno runs into Ishida years later, herself now working in a cat café.
